steps.title: Interpret percentage increase
steps.content: Increasing a quantity by 43% means keeping 100% of it and adding 43%. The total is: $$100\% + 43\% = 143\%$$

steps.title: Convert to decimal and apply to w
steps.content: Convert 143% to decimal form: $$143\% = \frac{143}{100} = 1.43$$ Multiplying the quantity $w$ by this gives $1.43w$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
